queries.question: what meeting types are associated with each HOA board?
queries.sql: SELECT Meetings.meeting_type  from Hoa_Boards_Meetings join Meetings on Hoa_Boards_Meetings.meeting_id = Meetings.meeting_id join Hoa_Boards on Hoa_Boards_Meetings.hoa_board_id = Hoa_Boards.board_id   GROUP BY Hoa_Boards_Meetings.meeting_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hoa_Boards_Meetings.hoa_board_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hoa_Boards)

queries.question: what meeting types are associated with each HOA board?
queries.sql: select hoa_boards.address , meetings.meeting_type from Hoa_Boards_Meetings join Meetings on Hoa_Boards_Meetings.meeting_id = Meetings.meeting_id join Hoa_Boards on Hoa_Boards_Meetings.hoa_board_id = Hoa_Boards.board_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?address ?meeting_type WHERE {
  ?hoa_boards_meetings a :Hoa_Boards_Meetings .
  ?meetings a :Meetings .
  ?hoa_boards_meetings p:hasMeetings ?meetings .
  ?hoa_boards a :Hoa_Boards .
  ?hoa_boards_meetings p:hasHoa_Boards ?hoa_boards .
  ?hoa_boards p:address ?address .
  ?meetings p:meeting_type ?meeting_type .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: what meeting types are associated with each HOA board?
